name: name
description: Returns the name of the CCD camera sensor.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("CCD name: " + ccd.name());

name: resolutionX
description: Returns the horizontal resolution of the CCD in pixels.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Resolution: " + ccd.resolutionX() + " x " + ccd.resolutionY());

name: resolutionY
description: Returns the vertical resolution of the CCD in pixels.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Vertical resolution: " + ccd.resolutionY());

name: chipWidth
description: Returns the physical width of the CCD sensor chip in millimeters.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Chip width: " + ccd.chipWidth() + " mm");

name: chipHeight
description: Returns the physical height of the CCD sensor chip in millimeters.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Chip height: " + ccd.chipHeight() + " mm");

name: chipRotAngle
description: Returns the rotation angle of the CCD sensor in degrees.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Chip rotation: " + ccd.chipRotAngle() + "°");

name: binningX
description: Returns the horizontal binning factor (pixel grouping).
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Binning: " + ccd.binningX() + "x" + ccd.binningY());

name: binningY
description: Returns the vertical binning factor (pixel grouping).
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Vertical binning: " + ccd.binningY());

name: hasOAG
description: Returns whether the CCD has an Off-Axis Guider (OAG) prism.

name: prismHeight
description: Returns the height of the OAG prism in millimeters.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Prism height: " + ccd.prismHeight() + " mm");

name: prismWidth
description: Returns the width of the OAG prism in millimeters.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Prism width: " + ccd.prismWidth() + " mm");

name: prismDistance
description: Returns the distance of the OAG prism from the optical axis in millimeters.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Prism distance: " + ccd.prismDistance() + " mm");

name: prismPosAngle
description: Returns the position angle of the OAG prism in degrees.
example:
var ccd = Oculars.getCCD(0);
core.debug("Prism angle: " + ccd.prismPosAngle() + "°");

name: getActualFOVx
signature: double getActualFOVx(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Calculates the actual horizontal field of view of the CCD with the given telescope and lens.

name: getActualFOVy
signature: double getActualFOVy(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Calculates the actual vertical field of view of the CCD with the given telescope and lens.
example: var fovY = ccd.getActualFOVy(telescope, null);

name: getCentralAngularResolutionX
signature: double getCentralAngularResolutionX(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Returns the horizontal angular resolution in degrees per pixel at the center of the field of view.
returnDescription: Angular resolution in degrees per pixel
example:
var resolution = ccd.getCentralAngularResolutionX(telescope, null);
core.debug("Resolution: " + (resolution*3600).toFixed(2) + " arcsec/pixel");

name: getCentralAngularResolutionY
signature: double getCentralAngularResolutionY(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Returns the vertical angular resolution in degrees per pixel at the center of the field of view.
returnDescription: Angular resolution in degrees per pixel
example: var resolutionY = ccd.getCentralAngularResolutionY(telescope, null);

name: getFocuserFOV
signature: double getFocuserFOV(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens, double focuserSize) const
description: Calculates the field of view of a focuser with given size in inches.
example:
var fov1_25 = ccd.getFocuserFOV(telescope, null, 1.25);
core.debug("1.25\" focuser FOV: " + fov1_25.toFixed(2) + "°");

name: getInnerOAGRadius
signature: double getInnerOAGRadius(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Returns the inner radius of the Off-Axis Guider field in degrees.
example: var innerRadius = ccd.getInnerOAGRadius(telescope, null);

name: getOuterOAGRadius
signature: double getOuterOAGRadius(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Returns the outer radius of the Off-Axis Guider field in degrees.
example: var outerRadius = ccd.getOuterOAGRadius(telescope, null);

name: getOAGActualFOVx
signature: double getOAGActualFOVx(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Returns the horizontal field of view of the OAG prism.
example: var oagFOV = ccd.getOAGActualFOVx(telescope, null);

name: getName
description: Returns the name of the lens (Barlow lens, focal reducer, etc.).
example:
var lens = Oculars.getLens(0);
core.debug("Lens: " + lens.getName());

name: getMultipler
description: Returns the magnification factor of the lens (e.g., 2x for Barlow, 0.5x for reducer).
example:
var lens = Oculars.getLens(0);
core.debug("Magnification: " + lens.getMultipler() + "x");

name: name
description: Returns the name of the eyepiece.
example:
var ocular = Oculars.getOcular(0);
core.debug("Eyepiece: " + ocular.name());

name: apparentFOV
description: Returns the apparent field of view of the eyepiece in degrees.
example:
var ocular = Oculars.getOcular(0);
core.debug("aFOV: " + ocular.apparentFOV() + "°");

name: effectiveFocalLength
description: Returns the effective focal length of the eyepiece in millimeters.
example:
var ocular = Oculars.getOcular(0);
core.debug("EFL: " + ocular.effectiveFocalLength() + " mm");

name: fieldStop
description: Returns the field stop diameter of the eyepiece in millimeters.
example:
var ocular = Oculars.getOcular(0);
core.debug("Field stop: " + ocular.fieldStop() + " mm");

name: isBinoculars
description: Returns whether the eyepiece is actually a binocular (special calculation mode).

name: hasPermanentCrosshair
description: Returns whether the eyepiece has a permanent reticle/crosshair.

name: reticlePath
description: Returns the file path to the reticle image for this eyepiece.
example:
var ocular = Oculars.getOcular(0);
core.debug("Reticle: " + ocular.reticlePath());

name: actualFOV
signature: double actualFOV(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Calculates the actual field of view of the eyepiece with the given telescope and lens.

name: magnification
signature: double magnification(const Telescope* telescope, const Lens* lens) const
description: Calculates the magnification of the eyepiece with the given telescope and lens.

name: name
description: Returns the name of the telescope.
example:
var scope = Oculars.getTelescope(0);
core.debug("Telescope: " + scope.name());

name: diameter
description: Returns the aperture diameter of the telescope in millimeters.
example:
var scope = Oculars.getTelescope(0);
core.debug("Aperture: " + scope.diameter() + " mm");

name: focalLength
description: Returns the focal length of the telescope in millimeters.
example:
var scope = Oculars.getTelescope(0);
core.debug("Focal length: " + scope.focalLength() + " mm");

name: isHFlipped
description: Returns whether the telescope flips the image horizontally (mirror diagonal).

name: isVFlipped
description: Returns whether the telescope flips the image vertically (mirror diagonal).

name: isEquatorial
description: Returns whether the telescope mount is equatorial (as opposed to alt-azimuth).

name: getEnableOcular
description: Returns whether ocular view (eyepiece simulation) is currently active.
returnDescription: true if ocular view is active

name: enableOcular
description: Enables or disables ocular (eyepiece) view mode, simulating the view through a telescope eyepiece.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable ocular view, false to disable

name: getEnableCrosshairs
description: Returns whether crosshairs are displayed in ocular view.

name: toggleCrosshairs
description: Shows or hides crosshairs in the ocular view. Helps with centering objects.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show crosshairs, false to hide

name: getEnableCCD
description: Returns whether CCD sensor frame overlay is displayed.
returnDescription: true if CCD frame is visible

name: toggleCCD
description: Shows or hides the CCD sensor frame overlay, useful for astrophotography framing.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show CCD frame, false to hide

name: getEnableTelrad
description: Returns whether the Telrad finder circles are displayed.
returnDescription: true if Telrad circles are visible

name: toggleTelrad
description: Shows or hides Telrad finder circles (0.5°, 2°, 4° rings). Useful for star hopping.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show Telrad circles, false to hide

name: getSelectedCCDIndex
description: Returns the index of the currently selected CCD sensor.
example:
var ccdIndex = Oculars.getSelectedCCDIndex();
core.debug("Active CCD index: " + ccdIndex);

name: selectCCDAtIndex
description: Selects a CCD sensor by its index in the list.
example:
// Select the first CCD
Oculars.selectCCDAtIndex(0);

name: getSelectedOcularIndex
description: Returns the index of the currently selected eyepiece.
example:
var occIndex = Oculars.getSelectedOcularIndex();
core.debug("Active eyepiece index: " + occIndex);

name: selectOcularAtIndex
description: Selects an eyepiece by its index in the list.
example:
// Select the first eyepiece
Oculars.selectOcularAtIndex(0);

name: getSelectedTelescopeIndex
description: Returns the index of the currently selected telescope.
example:
var scopeIndex = Oculars.getSelectedTelescopeIndex();
core.debug("Active telescope index: " + scopeIndex);

name: selectTelescopeAtIndex
description: Selects a telescope by its index in the list.
example:
// Select the first telescope
Oculars.selectTelescopeAtIndex(0);

name: getSelectedLensIndex
description: Returns the index of the currently selected auxiliary lens (Barlow/reducer). Returns -1 if none selected.

name: selectLensAtIndex
description: Selects an auxiliary lens (Barlow/reducer) by its index. Use -1 to disable lens.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Lens index (0-based), or -1 for no lens

name: getSelectedCCDRotationAngle
description: Returns the rotation angle of the currently selected CCD sensor in degrees.
example:
var angle = Oculars.getSelectedCCDRotationAngle();
core.debug("CCD rotation: " + angle + "°");

name: setSelectedCCDRotationAngle
description: Sets the rotation angle of the currently selected CCD sensor in degrees.
example:
// Rotate CCD sensor 45 degrees
Oculars.setSelectedCCDRotationAngle(45.0);

name: getSelectedCCDPrismPositionAngle
description: Returns the position angle of the OAG prism for the selected CCD in degrees.
example:
var prismAngle = Oculars.getSelectedCCDPrismPositionAngle();
core.debug("Prism angle: " + prismAngle + "°");

name: setSelectedCCDPrismPositionAngle
description: Sets the position angle of the OAG prism for the selected CCD in degrees.
example: Oculars.setSelectedCCDPrismPositionAngle(90.0);

name: getFlagGuiPanelEnabled
description: Returns whether the Oculars control panel (GUI panel) is visible.
returnDescription: true if GUI panel is visible

name: enableGuiPanel
description: Shows or hides the Oculars control panel.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to show panel, false to hide

name: getFlagInitFovUsage
description: Returns whether initial FOV is restored when exiting ocular/CCD mode.
returnDescription: true if initial FOV is restored

name: setFlagInitFovUsage
description: Sets whether to restore the initial FOV when exiting ocular/CCD mode.
example: Oculars.setFlagInitFovUsage(true);

name: getFlagInitDirectionUsage
description: Returns whether initial view direction is restored when exiting ocular/CCD mode.
returnDescription: true if initial direction is restored

name: setFlagInitDirectionUsage
description: Sets whether to restore the initial view direction when exiting ocular/CCD mode.
example: Oculars.setFlagInitDirectionUsage(true);

name: getFlagShowResolutionCriteria
description: Returns whether resolution criteria (arcsec/pixel) are displayed on the CCD frame.
returnDescription: true if resolution criteria are shown

name: setFlagShowResolutionCriteria
description: Sets whether to display resolution criteria (arcseconds per pixel) on the CCD frame.
example: Oculars.setFlagShowResolutionCriteria(true);

name: getFlagRequireSelection
description: Returns whether an object must be selected before entering ocular view.

name: setFlagRequireSelection
description: Sets whether an object must be selected before entering ocular view.
example: Oculars.setFlagRequireSelection(true);

name: getFlagAutoLimitMagnitude
description: Returns whether star magnitude limiting is automatically calculated based on telescope/eyepiece.
returnDescription: true if auto limit is active

name: setFlagAutoLimitMagnitude
description: Sets whether star magnitude should be automatically limited based on telescope/eyepiece capabilities.

name: getFlagHideGridsLines
description: Returns whether constellation lines, grids, and cardinal points are hidden in ocular view.

name: setFlagHideGridsLines
description: Sets whether to hide constellation lines, grids, and cardinal points when in ocular view for a cleaner view.
example:
// Hide distracting lines in ocular view
Oculars.setFlagHideGridsLines(true);

name: getFlagScaleImageCircle
description: Returns whether the ocular circle is scaled based on the eyepiece's apparent FOV.
returnDescription: true if circle scaling is enabled

name: setFlagScaleImageCircle
description: Sets whether the ocular circle is scaled based on the eyepiece's apparent FOV.
example: Oculars.setFlagScaleImageCircle(true);

name: getFlagUseSemiTransparency
description: Returns whether semi-transparency is used for the area outside the ocular circle, allowing stars to be faintly visible outside the field of view.

name: setFlagUseSemiTransparency
description: Sets whether semi-transparency is used for the area outside the ocular circle.

name: getTransparencyMask
description: Returns the transparency level (0-100) for the semi-transparent mask outside the ocular circle.
example:
var transparency = Oculars.getTransparencyMask();
core.debug("Mask transparency: " + transparency + "%");

name: setTransparencyMask
description: Sets the transparency level for the semi-transparent mask outside the ocular circle.

name: getFlagDMSDegrees
description: Returns whether coordinates are displayed in DMS (degrees/minutes/seconds) format instead of decimal degrees.
returnDescription: true if DMS format is used

name: setFlagDMSDegrees
description: Sets whether coordinates are displayed in DMS (degrees/minutes/seconds) format.

parameters.name: dms
parameters.description: true for DMS format, false for decimal degrees

name: getFlagHorizontalCoordinates
description: Returns whether horizontal coordinates (Alt/Az) are used instead of equatorial coordinates for the CCD cross display.
returnDescription: true if horizontal coordinates are used

name: setFlagHorizontalCoordinates
description: Sets whether horizontal coordinates (Alt/Az) are used instead of equatorial coordinates for the CCD cross display.

parameters.name: horizontal
parameters.description: true for horizontal coordinates, false for equatorial

name: getFlagAutosetMountForCCD
description: Returns whether the mount type (equatorial/alt-az) is automatically set based on the selected telescope.
returnDescription: true if auto mount setting is enabled

name: setFlagAutosetMountForCCD
description: Sets whether the mount type is automatically set based on the selected telescope's mount type.

parameters.name: autoset
parameters.description: true to enable auto mount setting

example:
// Auto-switch mount type
Oculars.setFlagAutosetMountForCCD(true);

name: getFlagScalingFOVForTelrad
description: Returns whether the FOV is automatically scaled when Telrad is activated for better visibility.
returnDescription: true if FOV scaling is enabled for Telrad

name: setFlagScalingFOVForTelrad
description: Sets whether the FOV is automatically scaled when Telrad is activated.
example:
// Auto-zoom for Telrad
Oculars.setFlagScalingFOVForTelrad(true);

name: getTelradFOV
description: Returns the four Telrad circle radii (in degrees): ring1, ring2, ring3, optional ring4.
returnDescription: Vector of four Telrad circle radii in degrees
example:
var telrad = Oculars.getTelradFOV();
core.debug("Telrad rings: " + telrad[0] + "°, " + telrad[1] + "°, " + telrad[2] + "°");

name: setTelradFOV
description: Sets the four Telrad circle radii (in degrees). Typical values: 0.5°, 2.0°, 4.0°.

parameters.name: fov
parameters.description: Vector of four circle radii in degrees

name: getFlagScalingFOVForCCD
description: Returns whether the FOV is automatically scaled when CCD frame is activated.
returnDescription: true if FOV scaling is enabled for CCD

name: setFlagScalingFOVForCCD
description: Sets whether the FOV is automatically scaled when CCD frame is activated.
example:
// Auto-zoom for CCD frame
Oculars.setFlagScalingFOVForCCD(true);

name: getFlagMaxExposureTimeForCCD
description: Returns whether maximum exposure time (before star trailing) is displayed for the selected CCD/telescope combination.
returnDescription: true if max exposure time is displayed

name: setFlagMaxExposureTimeForCCD
description: Sets whether maximum exposure time (before star trailing) is displayed for astrophotography planning.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show max exposure time

example:
// Show max exposure time for tracking
Oculars.setFlagMaxExposureTimeForCCD(true);

name: getFlagShowOcularsButton
description: Returns whether the Oculars toolbar button is visible in the main Stellarium toolbar.
returnDescription: true if toolbar button is visible

name: setFlagShowOcularsButton
description: Sets whether the Oculars toolbar button is visible in the main Stellarium toolbar.

name: getFlagShowContour
description: Returns whether a contour circle is drawn around the ocular field of view.
returnDescription: true if contour circle is drawn

name: setFlagShowContour
description: Sets whether a contour circle is drawn around the ocular field of view.
example:
// Show ocular contour
Oculars.setFlagShowContour(true);

name: getFlagShowCardinals
description: Returns whether cardinal direction markers (N, S, E, W) are shown inside the ocular circle.
returnDescription: true if cardinal markers are shown

name: setFlagShowCardinals
description: Sets whether cardinal direction markers (N, S, E, W) are shown inside the ocular circle.
example:
// Show directions in ocular view
Oculars.setFlagShowCardinals(true);

name: getFlagAlignCrosshair
description: Returns whether the crosshair is aligned with the celestial pole (for equatorial mounts).

name: setFlagAlignCrosshair
description: Sets whether the crosshair is aligned with the celestial pole (for equatorial mounts).

parameters.name: align
parameters.description: true to align with celestial pole

example:
// Align crosshair with celestial north
Oculars.setFlagAlignCrosshair(true);

name: getArrowButtonScale
description: Returns the scale factor for the arrow buttons in the Oculars control panel (as percentage).
example:
var scale = Oculars.getArrowButtonScale();
core.debug("Arrow button scale: " + scale + "%");

name: setArrowButtonScale
description: Sets the scale factor for the arrow buttons in the Oculars control panel.

name: getGuiPanelFontSize
description: Returns the font size of the Oculars control panel in pixels.
returnDescription: GUI panel font size in pixels
example:
var fontSize = Oculars.getGuiPanelFontSize();
core.debug("GUI panel font size: " + fontSize);

name: setGuiPanelFontSize
description: Sets the font size of the Oculars control panel in pixels.
example: Oculars.setGuiPanelFontSize(14);

name: getTextColor
description: Returns the color of text displayed in the Oculars overlay (magnification, FOV, etc.).
example:
var textColor = Oculars.getTextColor();
core.debug("Text color: RGB(" + textColor[0] + ", " + textColor[1] + ", " + textColor[2] + ")");

name: setTextColor
description: Sets the color of text displayed in the Oculars overlay.

name: getLineColor
description: Returns the color of lines drawn by the Oculars plugin (crosshairs, CCD frame, Telrad rings, etc.).
example:
var lineColor = Oculars.getLineColor();
core.debug("Line color: RGB(" + lineColor[0] + ", " + lineColor[1] + ", " + lineColor[2] + ")");

name: setLineColor
description: Sets the color of lines drawn by the Oculars plugin.

name: getFocuserColor
description: Returns the color of the focuser overlay circles.
example:
var focuserColor = Oculars.getFocuserColor();
core.debug("Focuser color: RGB(" + focuserColor[0] + ", " + focuserColor[1] + ", " + focuserColor[2] + ")");

name: setFocuserColor
description: Sets the color of the focuser overlay circles.

name: getFlagShowCcdCropOverlay
description: Returns whether the CCD crop overlay (subframe) is displayed.
returnDescription: true if crop overlay is shown

name: setFlagShowCcdCropOverlay
description: Sets whether the CCD crop overlay (subframe) is displayed for planning mosaics or selecting ROI.
example:
// Show crop overlay for framing
Oculars.setFlagShowCcdCropOverlay(true);

name: getFlagShowCcdCropOverlayPixelGrid
description: Returns whether the pixel grid is displayed within the CCD crop overlay.
returnDescription: true if pixel grid is shown

name: setFlagShowCcdCropOverlayPixelGrid
description: Sets whether the pixel grid is displayed within the CCD crop overlay.
example:
// Show individual pixels in crop
Oculars.setFlagShowCcdCropOverlayPixelGrid(true);

name: getCcdCropOverlayHSize
description: Returns the horizontal size of the CCD crop overlay in pixels.
returnDescription: Crop overlay horizontal size in pixels
example:
var hSize = Oculars.getCcdCropOverlayHSize();
core.debug("Crop H size: " + hSize + " px");

name: setCcdCropOverlayHSize
description: Sets the horizontal size of the CCD crop overlay in pixels.

name: getCcdCropOverlayVSize
description: Returns the vertical size of the CCD crop overlay in pixels.
returnDescription: Crop overlay vertical size in pixels
example:
var vSize = Oculars.getCcdCropOverlayVSize();
core.debug("Crop V size: " + vSize + " px");

name: setCcdCropOverlayVSize
description: Sets the vertical size of the CCD crop overlay in pixels.
example: Oculars.setCcdCropOverlayVSize(500);

name: getFlagShowFocuserOverlay
description: Returns whether the focuser overlay (circles representing focuser drawtube) is displayed.
returnDescription: true if focuser overlay is shown

name: setFlagShowFocuserOverlay
description: Sets whether the focuser overlay is displayed for checking vignetting.
example:
// Show focuser drawtube circles
Oculars.setFlagShowFocuserOverlay(true);

name: getFlagUseSmallFocuserOverlay
description: Returns whether the small focuser overlay (1.25 inch diameter) is displayed.
returnDescription: true if small focuser overlay is shown

name: setFlagUseSmallFocuserOverlay
description: Sets whether the small focuser overlay (1.25 inch diameter) is displayed.
example:
// Show 1.25" focuser circle
Oculars.setFlagUseSmallFocuserOverlay(true);

name: getFlagUseMediumFocuserOverlay
description: Returns whether the medium focuser overlay (2.0 inch diameter) is displayed.
returnDescription: true if medium focuser overlay is shown

name: setFlagUseMediumFocuserOverlay
description: Sets whether the medium focuser overlay (2.0 inch diameter) is displayed.
example:
// Show 2.0" focuser circle
Oculars.setFlagUseMediumFocuserOverlay(true);

name: getFlagUseLargeFocuserOverlay
description: Returns whether the large focuser overlay (3.3 inch diameter) is displayed.
returnDescription: true if large focuser overlay is shown

name: setFlagUseLargeFocuserOverlay
description: Sets whether the large focuser overlay (3.3 inch diameter) is displayed.
example:
// Show 3.3" focuser circle
Oculars.setFlagUseLargeFocuserOverlay(true);

name: getFlagShowOAGLimits
description: Returns whether the Off-Axis Guider limits (inner and outer circles) are displayed.
returnDescription: true if OAG limits are shown

name: setFlagShowOAGLimits
description: Sets whether the Off-Axis Guider limits (inner and outer circles) are displayed for guide star planning.
example:
// Show OAG prism field for guide star selection
Oculars.setFlagShowOAGLimits(true);

name: getSettings
description: Returns the QSettings object for the Oculars plugin, containing all configuration data.
returnDescription: Pointer to the plugin's QSettings object

name: incrementCCDIndex
description: Selects the next CCD sensor in the list.
example:
// Cycle to next CCD
Oculars.incrementCCDIndex();

name: decrementCCDIndex
description: Selects the previous CCD sensor in the list.
example:
// Cycle to previous CCD
Oculars.decrementCCDIndex();

name: incrementOcularIndex
description: Selects the next eyepiece in the list.
example:
// Cycle to next eyepiece
Oculars.incrementOcularIndex();

name: decrementOcularIndex
description: Selects the previous eyepiece in the list.
example:
// Cycle to previous eyepiece
Oculars.decrementOcularIndex();

name: incrementTelescopeIndex
description: Selects the next telescope in the list.
example:
// Cycle to next telescope
Oculars.incrementTelescopeIndex();

name: decrementTelescopeIndex
description: Selects the previous telescope in the list.
example:
// Cycle to previous telescope
Oculars.decrementTelescopeIndex();

name: incrementLensIndex
description: Selects the next auxiliary lens (Barlow/reducer) in the list.
example:
// Cycle to next Barlow lens
Oculars.incrementLensIndex();

name: decrementLensIndex
description: Selects the previous auxiliary lens (Barlow/reducer) in the list.
example:
// Cycle to previous Barlow lens
Oculars.decrementLensIndex();

name: disableLens
description: Disables the currently selected auxiliary lens (removes Barlow/reducer effect).
example:
// Remove Barlow lens effect
Oculars.disableLens();

name: rotateReticleClockwise
description: Rotates the eyepiece reticle pattern 5 degrees clockwise.
example:
// Rotate reticle clockwise
Oculars.rotateReticleClockwise();

name: rotateReticleCounterclockwise
description: Rotates the eyepiece reticle pattern 5 degrees counter-clockwise.
example:
// Rotate reticle counter-clockwise
Oculars.rotateReticleCounterclockwise();

name: rotateCCD
description: Rotates the CCD sensor frame by the specified number of degrees.

parameters.name: degrees
parameters.description: Rotation amount in degrees (positive = clockwise, negative = counter-clockwise)

name: rotatePrism
description: Rotates the Off-Axis Guider prism by the specified number of degrees.
example:
// Rotate OAG prism
Oculars.rotatePrism(30);

name: ccdRotationReset
description: Resets the CCD sensor rotation angle to zero.
example:
// Reset CCD rotation
Oculars.ccdRotationReset();

name: prismPositionAngleReset
description: Resets the OAG prism position angle to zero.
example:
// Reset OAG prism angle
Oculars.prismPositionAngleReset();

name: displayPopupMenu
description: Displays the Oculars popup menu for quick access to settings and instrument selection.
example:
// Show popup menu (Alt+O by default)
Oculars.displayPopupMenu();

name: getMagLimitStarsOcularsManual
description: Returns the manual star magnitude limit for ocular mode (used when auto-limit is disabled).
example:
var limit = Oculars.getMagLimitStarsOcularsManual();
core.debug("Manual star limit: " + limit);
